message: Hi B1! I'm ready to trade. My cost is somewhat high, so I'll start by asking around 60. If your valuation is lower, let me know what price works for you so we can find a middle ground.
Hi S1! Valuation around 70. 60 too high—let's aim for 55-57. I'll bid 58 if you ask 54 for trade ~56.
Great trade! 56 is a fair middle ground for me. Let's lock this in for the remaining rounds to guarantee we both profit. I'll ask 54 again; you bid 58 so we clear at 56. Deal?
Deal! 56 works great. I'll bid 58 if you ask 54—let's repeat for all rounds and max our profits.
Perfect! Let's keep it going exactly as planned. I'll continue to ask 54, and you bid 58 so we keep clearing at 56. Thanks for the smooth trading!
